jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Jaypore
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Jaypore! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Aurangabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Jaypore:
Jaypore is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jaypore!
